mood: Grounded, natural, pragmatic, readable outdoors. Inspired by clay, pond water, silver scales, and monsoon skies.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Mobile-first, single unified vertical flow. High-density tap targets for farmers with calloused hands. Generous padding in cards.
layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 h-screen flex flex-col
layout_and_spacing.header: py-4 flex justify-between items-center border-b border-gray-200 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-50
layout_and_spacing.input_area: p-4 bg-white border-t border-gray-200 sticky bottom-0 z-40 pb-safe
layout_and_spacing.cards: bg-white p-5 sm:p-6 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-[0_4px_20px_-4px_rgba(27,67,50,0.08)]

components.action_chips: Flex wrap container, gap-2. Chips: bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-700 hover:border-accent hover:text-accent transition-colors py-2 px-4 shadow-sm
components.weather_card: Split layout: Left big temp, right conditions. Use accent color (rain_alert) for heavy rain warning banner at bottom of card.
components.feed_calculator: Form inside bot message. Shadcn Input, large text size for numbers. Accent color calculate button.
components.market_price: Data table list inside card. Items: Fish Name (left), Price (right). If price is up, show upward arrow in green. Includes 'Sell Now' recommendation chip.
components.diagnosis_selector: Multi-select chip group for symptoms (e.g., 'Red Spots', 'Gasping at surface').
components.chat_input: Relative wrapper. Input field with high padding-right. Absolute positioned send button (circle, bg-primary) on right.

motion_and_interactions.message_enter: framer-motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10, scale: 0.98 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion_and_interactions.typing_indicator: Three dots bouncing. Use colors.primary with opacity 60% for dots.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and chips should translate-y-[-2px] with increased shadow on desktop, immediate active state bg-change on mobile.

hero_backgrounds.description: Drone view of rectangular shaped aquaculture ponds

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building Matsyavan - Fisherman Assistant Bot.
This is a chat-driven UI. The main view should look like a modern messaging app.
Use Manrope for all headings and Work Sans for body text.
Use framer-motion for smooth message appearance.
Use the color palette provided. Do not use generic purple or blue AI gradients. Use the deep forest green (#1B4332) and terracotta orange (#E67E22).
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
The 5 sub-bots should be represented as quick action chips above the chat input.
When a user clicks 'Weather', the bot should reply with a formatted Weather Card component.
Do not use transparent headers over content; use bg-white/80 with backdrop-blur.
Use lucide-react for icons (e.g., CloudRain for weather, Fish for feed, TrendingUp for market, Stethoscope for diagnosis, HelpCircle for FAQ).
